{{Fig|14 [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rafael_Nadal Rafael Nadal]'s pictures are being tiled with the assistance of the '''[[Element menu#Components|Tile arrangement]]''' tool. You can use this tool to easily determine in how many rows and columns you want to arrange the pictures available in the current [[Glossary:Element|element]]. In the picture, the element holds the pictures <!-- (imported with '''[[Edit menu|Edit]] : [[Web import]] : Pictures''') --> of the Spanish tennis player celebrating the match points of all his 14 [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/French_Open French Opens].}}
